design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate themed levels as Taz, using spin-tornado mechanic to defeat enemies and overcome obstacles while collecting food items and searching for the Lost Valley's giant egg
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Resource management (health/lives via consumables) and platforming execution with spin-attack positioning
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Playing as the energetic Tasmanian Devil using his signature tornado spin ability to devour obstacles and enemies
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Taz-Mania emphasizes accessibility and visual spectacle over difficulty; the spin-attack is both a combat tool and mobility enhancer, making it the core problem-solving verb rather than traditional jump-based platforming

difficulty.lives_system: Multiple lives available; consumable items (food, extra lives) scattered throughout levels and obtainable by eating objects
difficulty.continues_system: Continues available as consumable items eaten during gameplay
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: High agency through resource consumption mechanics—players can eat restorative items or save extra lives/continues for difficult sections; difficulty tuned to be forgiving for broader audience

progression.upgrade_system: Temporary power-ups: chilli peppers grant fire-breathing ability; stars grant temporary invincibility; spin-tornado is core mechanic throughout
progression.unlock_mechanism: Hidden level select (cheat code: A, Y, A, Y, X, Y, B, A, R, L at Options menu), suggesting sequential stage progression in normal play
replayability_hooks: Hidden level select enables non-linear stage replay
Collectible items and consumables encourage alternative routing
Spin-attack positioning skill ceiling allows mastery-driven replay

world_building_techniques: Themed level design representing various Tasmania locations en route to Lost Valley
Cartoon character protagonist with established personality (Taz)
Quest framing (search for giant bird egg) provides loose narrative structure across stages

environmental_storytelling: Progressive journey through Tasmanian landscape toward Lost Valley destination
Stage-specific visual theming reinforces exploration narrative
Enemy types contextual to each area (implied by level design variety)

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Taz-Mania (SNES) article
